abilities.description: Any number of target nonland permanents you control phase out. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until your next turn.)

effect.description: Any number of target nonland permanents you control phase out. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until your next turn.)
effect.name: Phases

abilities.target_prompt: Select any number of target nonland permanents you control
